REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 1AND8 INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS DENIED. ACCORDING TO THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY THE MOVING PARTY, "1AND8, INC, A NEW YORK CORPORATION," THE SIGNATORY TO THE CONTRACT MERGED INTO "1AND8, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION," SHORTLY AFTER THE CONTRACT WAS EXECUTED. "1AND8, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION," THE SOLE DEFENDANT IN THIS ACTION WAS SERVED BY A REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER ON ITS AGENT FOR PROCESS OF SERVICE, RENNIE GARDINER. GARDINER DECLARATION FAILS TO OVERCOME THE PRESUMPTION AFFORDED REGISTERED PROCESS SERVERS. "1AND8, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION" FAILS TO MEET THE STANDARD UNDER CCP 473 OR RAPPLEYEA V. CAMPBELL (1994) 8 CAL.4TH 975. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: MICHELLE G. COOPER, CSR #13572, MGRACIANO@ELITESTENO.COM, 562-279-5792. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 1AND8, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21, 2022. THE ONLY DEFENDANT IN THIS ACTION IS "1AND8, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION." NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 23, 2022 THE PRINCIPAL OF THE CORPORATION THAT FILED THIS MOTION SHALL FILE A DECLARATION STATING WHETHER (1) THE MOVING ENTITY IS THE "1AND8, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION;" OR THE MOVING ENTITY IS SOME OTHER CORPORATION, (E.G. "1AND8, CALIFORNIA CORPORATION" (GARSON DECLARATION 2:6-7); (2) THE CONNECTION BETWEEN THE TWO CORPORATIONS, IF ANY; AND (3) WHICH CORPORATION, IF ANY, IS THE PARTY TO THE LEASE AT ISSUE IN THIS ACTION. NO FURTHER ARGUMENT IS REQUIRED, ONLY THE DECLARATION AS DESCRIBED ABOVE SHALL BE FILED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Edward P. Garson; Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP; 415-433-0990; appearing on behalf of defendant 1AND8, Inc.
Samantha F. Lamberg; Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP; 310-540-2000; appearing on behalf of plaintiff One Grant Property Owner, LLC.

Court reporter: Michelle G. Cooper, CSR #13572, mgraciano@elitesteno.com, 562-279-5792.

Defendant and moving party 1AND8, Inc. contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT 1AND8 INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is DENIED. According to the evidence presented by the moving party, "1and8, Inc, a New York corporation," the signatory to the contract merged into "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation," shortly after the contract was executed. "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation," the sole defendant in this action was served by a registered process server on its agent for process of service, Rennie Gardiner. Gardiner declaration fails to overcome the presumption afforded registered process servers. "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation" fails to meet the standard under CCP 473 or Rappleyea v. Campbell (1994) 8 Cal.4th 975.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Michelle G. Cooper, CSR #13572, mgraciano@elitesteno.com, 562-279-5792. (D501)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Continued To Oct-21-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT 1AND8, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to October 21, 2022. The only defendant in this action is "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation." No later than September 23, 2022 the principal of the corporation that filed this motion shall file a declaration stating whether (1) the moving entity is the "1and8, Inc, a Delaware corporation;" or the moving entity is some other corporation, (e.g. "1and8, California corporation" (Garson Declaration 2:6-7); (2) the connection between the two corporations, if any; and (3) which corporation, if any, is the party to the Lease at issue in this action. No further argument is required, only the declaration as described above shall be filed.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Continued To Apr-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant 1AND8 Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:41 a.m., adjourning at 10:43 a.m. and resuming at 11:05 a.m.

Samantha Lamberg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff One Grant Property Owner LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
John Birnbaum, General Counsel for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Swati Patel, Property Controller and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath, but did not testify.
Ms. Lamberg, Mr. Birnbaum and Ms. Patel all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant 1AND8 Inc., a Delaware corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint was filed on July 16, 2020, and personally served on defendant 1AND8 Inc.'s Agent or Process on August 6, 2020.
Default as to defendant 1AND8 Inc. was entered on October 6, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 17, 2020.

Plaintiff One Grant Property Owner LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's reveiw:
Exhibit A: License Agreemnt...........................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit B: First Amendment to License Agreement.......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit C: Second Amendment to License Agreement......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit D: Third Amendment to License Agreement.......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit E: Fourth Amendment to License Agreement......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit F: Fifth Amendment to License Agreement.......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit G: Monthly Invoices - March, 2020 through February, 2021......................ID/EVID
Exhibit H: Notice of Default dated April 21, 2020.....................................ID/EVID
Exhibit I: Notice of Default dated May 13, 2020.......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit J: Early Termination Notice dated January 3, 2020.............................ID/EVID
Exhibit K: Current Aging..............................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff One Grant Property Owner LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant 1AND8 Inc., a Delaware corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,384,780.00.
Costs - $878.95.

Total - $1,385,658.95.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 11:30 a.m.
